description: A simple designed 'FACT SHEET' title-card graphic on a solid medium-blue background. Large centered white serif text reads: 'President Biden's Presidential Proclamation and Joint DHS-DOJ Interim Final Rule Cut Encounters at Southwest Border by Over 40 Percent in First Three Weeks.' The white circular DHS (U.S. Department of Homeland Security) seal sits to the right of the text. A thin horizontal red rule separates the headline from a bold all-caps white word 'FACT SHEET' at the bottom with a subtle drop shadow. This is a policy-promotion / statistic-touting graphic from the prior (Biden) administration, framing the June 2024 asylum proclamation as a success in reducing border encounters; target audience is the press and general public. No photographs — purely typographic government messaging.
notable_text: President Biden's Presidential Proclamation and Joint DHS-DOJ Interim Final Rule Cut Encounters at Southwest Border by Over 40 Percent in First Three Weeks; FACT SHEET
